'''Murninkam''' was a tropical [[Planet/Legends|world]] far from the space lanes. The [[Kajiin Swamp]] can be found there.

[[Spinda Caveel]] chose that planet for his hideout, both because of its isolated astrographic location, and the dangerous natural environment. His fortress/laboratory stood out in the jungle, but inside a powerful [[Full-globe class-one Imperial shield]]. The [[Pike Sisters]], under Caveel's employ, came to the planet to deliver him [[A-OIC]], a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] they had stolen. The planet was protected by their [[Robotic picket ship]]s, which engaged [[Guri]]'s ''[[Stinger]]'', and fell into Kajiin, soon followed by [[Kar Yang's ship]], being after Guri.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]]</ref> Guri left the planet with A-OIC, secretly followed by [[Kar Yang]].<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
